

## Publications 

1. Richter, F. G.-C., Arrojo, S., Sun, J., Fischer, R. L., & Stacklin, R. (2026). Enriching data analytics with experiential knowledge to inform community interventions for more equitable infant health. Journal of Integrated Global STEM. https://doi.org/10.1515/jigs-2025-0011

2. Fischer, R. L., Richter, F. G. C., Prince, D., Ray-Novak, M., Henderson, M., Steh, S., Andre, J., Arrojo, S., Sun, J., Hajski, A., & Ashley, M. (2024). Leveraging integrated data to examine youth homelessness (Report). U.S. Department of Housing and Urban Development. 
https://case.edu/socialwork/povertycenter/sites/default/files/202501/CWRU%20HUD%20Final%20Report%2010-31-2024.pdf 


## Why I Teach

I am passionate about teaching because it allows me to share the knowledge I’ve gained and to learn from students' diverse perspectives. I hope to prepare future practitioners to make a positive impact.

----

## Courses I Teach

SASS 528 Evidence-informed Practice

SASS 410 Nonprofit Databased Decision-Making

SASS 561 Community Practice Policy: Policy Analysis and Advocacy

SASS 540 Integrated Health and Wellness Specialized Policy Course



----
